notes: ESC mid-match now counts as DEFEAT — no win bonus, no daily progress, no results overlay (you opted out, no rewards). Post-match click crash hardened with same-frame state flip + deferred overlay free. Mouse cursor switches to a neon cyan crosshair while a match is live (the OS cursor was washed out on the dark grid).
launcher_notes: Hardened self-update flow on Windows. Manifest now served from pulsewavegame.com with 30s cache.
